title: Contract Kit Task Graph
description: Directed acyclic graph (DAG) of buildable units that any compliant agent can claim. Anchor 1 of CONTRACT_KIT_CREATOR_ANCHORS.md. Validates structurally: no cycles, all dependsOn ids exist, all leaf tasks (those nothing depends on) carry concrete acceptance criteria. Edges are derived from dependsOn but may be listed explicitly for tooling/diagram purposes.

version.description: Optional SemVer of this task-graph document.

tasks.description: Buildable units. Every id must be unique. Every value in any task's dependsOn array must reference another task's id (validator enforces this; JSON Schema cannot).

edges.description: Optional explicit edges for diagram/tooling consumers. Each edge connects two task ids. Validators may treat edges as authoritative or derive them from dependsOn.

id.description: Stable task id, e.g. T-001. Must be unique across the task array.

title.description: Short imperative phrase ('Scaffold auth API', 'Wire S3 image upload').

dependsOn.description: Ids of tasks that must complete before this one starts. Empty array means a root task. Each id must reference an existing task (validator enforces; JSON Schema cannot).

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given/When/Then prose or a bullet list of RFC 2119 criteria. Required for every leaf task; recommended for non-leaf tasks. May reference REQ-XXX or ADR-XXXX ids.

assigneeRole.description: Agent role expected to claim this task. Common values: 'planner', 'frontend-eng', 'backend-eng', 'qa', 'devops', 'security', 'doc-writer', 'researcher'.

estimatedHours.description: Optional estimate in person-hours. Used by the supervisor agent for capacity planning.

kind.description: Optional edge classification. 'depends-on' is the default; 'informs' indicates a soft, non-blocking link.
